intro: Rilla CEO Sebastian Jimenez details his AI startup's employee investment strategy, allocating $37,000 annually per employee including an $18,000 housing stipend to support office-proximity living. Google is developing a Gemini-powered feature in Google Maps that would enable users to discover restaurants and place food orders without leaving the application. The NHS plans to deploy AI on its app to direct patients to appropriate services, with the rollout expected to reach approximately 200,000 patients in England over the next year.

whitelist.title: As an AI startup CEO, I pay each employee $18,000 a year to live near the office, and here is why
whitelist.desc: Sebastian Jimenez, the CEO of Rilla, explains why the AI startup invests $37,000 a year in perks for every employee, including a housing stipend.

whitelist.title: Google Maps could soon order food for you using Gemini
whitelist.desc: Google Maps is reportedly developing a Gemini-powered feature that could let users discover restaurants and place food orders without leaving the app.

whitelist.title: NHS to use AI on its app to direct patients to appropriate services
whitelist.desc: Update in England expected to reach about 200,000 patients over the next year as part of £10bn package to overhaul NHS systems

whitelist.title: Agentic AI tools now need real safeguards against this kind of indirection.
whitelist.desc: Hidden DNS trick turns Claude Code into a malware courier

whitelist.title: Doctors’ soaring use of AI scribes prompts Australian government warning over privacy

whitelist.title: Credible AI Lab Critics Pile Up As The Bubble Math Worsens
whitelist.desc: Operators, auditors, and SEC filings now question AI lab economics. Inside the lab losses, Karp's warning, and Oracle's nonpayment risk.

whitelist.title: How your smartwatch and AI might detect early signs of illness - Engadget
whitelist.desc: Wearables are best at noticing breaks from your body's usual patterns. Those outliers can hint that something warrants further investigation with your doctor.

whitelist.title: My family moved from the US to Spain. Claude has helped us navigate a new language and systems.
whitelist.desc: Moving my family to Spain made AI part of daily life. Watching my children learn from it has changed how I think about technology.

whitelist.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

whitelist.title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: Alibaba has reportedly classified Claude Code as high-risk software.

whitelist.title: Anthropic launches "AI workbench" for scientists using Claude

whitelist.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor | TechCrunch
whitelist.desc: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

whitelist.title: Only these iPhone models are getting the new Siri AI this fall - Engadget
whitelist.desc: Devices compatible with Apple Intelligence will be eligible for the Siri AI update in Q3 of 2026. This includes all iPhones since the 15 Pro.

whitelist.title: Washington Should Take OpenAI’s Equity Offer
whitelist.desc: OpenAI wants to give Washington 5% of the company. Critics cry socialism, but an Alaska-style fund built on contributed equity is a deal Congress would be foolish to refuse.

whitelist.title: How To Write With AI Without Losing Your Original Voice
whitelist.desc: Most AI writing is terrible. These 4 simple moves make yours sound human and impossible to ignore. Unmistakably you.

whitelist.title: Macron and Modi court tech CEOs in AI infrastructure race

whitelist.title: OpenAI never visited its Stargate UK site, Guardian finds

whitelist.title: OpenAI’s apparent failure to visit key site raises questions over UK investment
